evals.prompt: Hey, can you make me a PPT on AI in healthcare? It's for hospital executives, about 10 slides. I want to pitch why we should invest in AI diagnostics.
evals.expected_output: A .pptx file with ~10 slides covering AI in healthcare diagnostics, pitched to executives. Each slide has title, key message, and visual instructions. Ends with a self-review checklist.

evals.prompt: I need to create presentation materials for a new employee onboarding session. The audience is fresh college grads joining our engineering team. Should be around 8 slides and cover: company culture, how we work, tools we use, and what to expect in the first 90 days.
evals.expected_output: A .pptx with ~8 slides for new engineer onboarding. Content covers culture, working style, tooling, and 90-day expectations. Visual instructions and key messages tailored to a fresh-grad audience.

evals.prompt: Build me a slide deck about climate change impacts for a high school science class. Keep it to about 6 slides, make it engaging for teenagers.
evals.expected_output: A .pptx with ~6 slides on climate change impacts, written for teenagers. Uses accessible language, engaging visuals, concrete examples. Includes self-review checklist.
